chunks.section_title: Item 2.02  Results of Operations and Financial Condition.
chunks.content: On January 26, 2022, Flex Ltd. (the “Company”) issued a press release announcing  financial results for its third quarter ended December 31, 2021. A copy of the press release is furnished with this report as Exhibit 99.1.
